caption: A man wearing a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, tan suspenders, glasses, and a tall, grey, peaked wig sits in a podcast studio. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with various framed photographs and clothing items. A logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears on the screen. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing. In the beginning, he touches his neck with his right hand. As the scene progresses, he lowers his hand and gestures with his right arm while continuing to talk, his facial expression shifting slightly as he speaks. The setting and equipment remain static while the man's upper body and facial movements provide the only change across the frames.
